title: hydrocotyle rugulosa
intro: Hydrocotyle rugulosa, also known as Small-leaved Pennywort, is a plant species native to Australia, known for its small, rounded leaves and creeping stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle rugulosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and support eye health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and can also be added to skincare products due to its antioxidant properties.
